creator: slaven@rezic.de
text:
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG> writes:

> Maintainer of astro/ephem,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/108190 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108190
> 

The author of the patch <slaven@rezic.de> and me
<eserte@cs.tu-berlin.de> is the same person.

-- 
Slaven Rezic - slaven <at> rezic <dot> de

    tkrevdiff - graphical display of diffs between revisions (RCS, CVS or SVN)
